response:
<<Energy and Freedom>>

Some people prefer releasing energy through work while others prefer to release it through [exercise]. The body needs movement to stay healthy and active. [Baseball] players use their muscles to hit the ball.

* * *

The poker player was not gaining money on the night, what was he doing instead? [Loosing] money is a common outcome in games of chance. [Alcohol] can affect decision-making in such situations. [Committee] members often discuss strategies during games.

* * *

Where does a bald eagle like to fly? [Open country] offers clear skies and wide spaces. [Book] stores are not the usual habitat for eagles. [Trip] planning can involve researching flight paths. [Book] clubs often discuss nature-related topics.
